title: DocPlanner - Healthcare Booking Platform
problem: European patients struggle to find and book doctor appointments. No unified platform across fragmented healthcare systems.
solution: Doctor booking platform operating across 15+ countries. Appointment scheduling, practice management, telemedicine.
technology: Marketplace, scheduling, practice management software, telemedicine
regulatory_notes: GDPR, EU healthcare regulations, country-specific requirements
varden_fit: HIGH - Doctor discovery and booking platform across Europe. Infrastructure for patient access.
notes: boring_software=true, contrarian=false. CEE/EU representation. Largest doctor booking platform in Europe.
